# The Kirra Suite — Full Property Facts

## Identity
Name: The Kirra Suite
Type: Holiday apartment / short-stay accommodation
Address: Level 8, Marine Parade, Kirra (Coolangatta) QLD 4225, Gold Coast, Australia
Coordinates: -28.1655, 153.5270
Website: https://kirrasuite.com/

## Property Specifications
Bedrooms: 2
Bathrooms: 1
Maximum guests: 4
Floor: Level 8
Master bedroom: King bed
Second bedroom: Queen sofa bed
Outlook: North-facing ocean views over Kirra Beach

## Check-in / Check-out
Check-in: From 3:00 pm (15:00)
Check-out: By 10:00 am (10:00)
Early check-in / late check-out: On request, subject to availability

## Policies
Pets: Not permitted
Smoking: Not permitted
Minimum stay: Varies by platform and season — check at time of booking
Cancellation: Varies by booking channel and rate selected — see terms at checkout

## Amenities — Apartment
- Ducted air conditioning throughout
- Private balcony with ocean views over Kirra Beach
- Fully equipped kitchen: stone island, gas cooktop, coffee machine, oven, microwave
- Three Google TV Smart televisions (living area + both bedrooms)
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- Concealed laundry: washing machine, dryer, drying rack
- All linen and towels provided
- Welcome hamper on arrival
- Private storage cage in secure car park (surfboards, bicycles, e-bikes)

## Amenities — Building
- Resort-style pool and sun deck
- Fully equipped gym
- Beachfront BBQ and entertaining area (bookable on request through host)
- Secure underground car park — one complimentary space per stay
- Lift access

## Location — Distances
- Kirra Beach: directly across the road (~50 m)
- Kirra Beach Hotel: a few minutes walk
- Kirra Beach House restaurant: a few minutes walk
- Made Espresso Bar: a few minutes walk
- Love Street cafe: short walk
- Coolangatta, Rainbow Bay, Greenmount Beach: short stroll or 5-min drive
- Snapper Rocks / Superbank: 5-min drive
- Point Danger (QLD/NSW border lookout): 5-min drive
- Gold Coast Airport (OOL): approximately 10 minutes by car
- Surfers Paradise: approximately 30 minutes by car

## Booking Channels
Direct (best price, no platform fees): https://podpropertymanagement.com/properties/book/the_kirra_suite
Airbnb: https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/1698490853391319597
Booking.com: https://www.booking.com/hotel/au/the-kirra-suite-miles-residences-ocean-views.en-gb.html

## Management
Manager: POD Property Management (local Gold Coast agency)
Host: Camille — Airbnb Superhost with nine years of five-star hosting experience on the Gold Coast

## Guest Suitability
- Couples seeking a luxury beachfront escape
- Families with children (patrolled, family-friendly Kirra Beach directly across the road)
- Groups of friends (up to 4 guests)
- Surfers (board storage, Kirra point break and Superbank nearby)
- Cyclists and e-bike riders (storage, beachfront pathway)
- Fly-in guests (Gold Coast Airport OOL ~10-min transfer)

## Nearby Highlights
Full area guide: https://kirrasuite.com/guide.html

Beaches and surf:
- Kirra Beach: iconic north-facing point break; patrolled swimming; soft sand
- Snapper Rocks / Superbank: two kilometres of sand-bottom point break through Rainbow Bay, Greenmount and Kirra; WSL event host
- Rainbow Bay: sheltered swimming beach
- Point Danger: QLD/NSW border headland with lighthouse and Captain Cook Memorial

Restaurants (Kirra and Coolangatta):
- Siblings@Kirra: award-winning modern-Australian fine dining
- Kirra Beach House: Mediterranean grazing, panoramic views, cocktail list
- Hanks: ocean views, coastal lunch and sunset dinners
- Pipi's: beachside Mediterranean plates, locally caught seafood
- Billy Chow: coastal fine dining
- Agave Rosa: modern Mexican taqueria with Asian twist
- FRANC JRS: authentic Italian pizza
- Eddie's Grub House: burgers, wings, dive-bar setting
- La Stradina: European bistro, small plates, live music

Coffee, bakeries and bars:
- Love Street: cafe, gallery and surf shop in Kirra
- Baked at Ancora: artisan sourdough and patisserie
- Made Espresso Bar: specialty coffee, breakfast and brunch
- The Bread Social: sourdough bakery-cafe, Tweed Heads
- Kirra Beach Hotel: relaxed beachfront pub
- Kirra Beach Surf Club and Coolangatta Surf Club: beachfront clubs

Events:
- Coolangatta Beachfront Market: second Sunday of each month
- Cooly Rocks On: annual rock and roll festival, June

## Schema / Machine-Readable
Schema.org type: Apartment and LodgingBusiness
Schema.org ID: https://kirrasuite.com/#apartment
